name: Welcome to Little Movers
subject: Welcome to Little Movers - Let's Get Started, {{first_name}}!
html_content:
Welcome, {{first_name}}!

Thanks for joining the Little Movers family. Your home-exercise guide for children with developmental delays is ready at littlemoversguide.com. We're so glad you're here.

name: Early Access Confirmation
subject: You're on the Early Access List - Little Movers Guide
html_content:
You're In, {{first_name}}!

We've saved your spot on the Little Movers early access list. You'll be among the first to receive the complete guide and bonus exercises when we launch. Stay tuned!

name: Monthly Home-Exercise Tip Digest
subject: Your Little Movers Tip for {{month}} - Try This at Home!
html_content:
Monthly Home-Exercise Tip

Hi {{first_name}}, here is this month's featured exercise from Greg: {{tip_title}}. {{tip_description}} Remember, consistency matters more than duration. Even 5 minutes a day adds up!

name: Chapter Release Notification
subject: New Chapter Available: {{chapter_name}} - Little Movers Guide
html_content:
{{chapter_name}} Is Here!

Hi {{first_name}}, a new chapter of the Little Movers Guide has just been released. Log in at littlemoversguide.com to read {{chapter_name}} and try the new exercises with your child today.

name: Clinician Outreach Introduction
subject: A Resource for Your Patients' Families - Little Movers Guide
html_content:
Hello {{first_name}},

I'm Greg Howard, DPT, a pediatric physical therapist in Columbus, OH. I created Little Movers to help parents continue therapy goals at home between appointments. I'd love to share a complimentary clinician copy with you for review.

name: Parent Onboarding - Day 1
subject: Day 1: How to Use the Little Movers Guide
html_content:
Let's Begin, {{first_name}}!

Today we walk you through the guide structure, how to choose the right exercises for your child's age and developmental needs, and how to track progress over time. Start with Chapter 1: Tummy Time Foundations.

name: Parent Onboarding - Day 3
subject: Day 3: Your First Week of Exercises - Little Movers
html_content:
How's It Going, {{first_name}}?

By now you've had a chance to try a few exercises. Here are three tips for making home therapy fun and sustainable for your whole family without burning out.

name: Parent Onboarding - Day 7
subject: One Week In - How Is Your Child Doing?
html_content:
One Week Down, {{first_name}}!

You've completed your first week of the Little Movers program. Here are some signs of progress to look for, plus how to adjust exercise difficulty as your child grows stronger and more confident.

name: Beta Tester Invitation
subject: You're Invited: Beta Test the Little Movers Guide
html_content:
Special Invitation, {{first_name}}!

We'd love your feedback on the Little Movers Guide before our public launch. As a beta tester, you'll receive free lifetime access in exchange for a short survey after 30 days of use. Reply to this email to accept.

name: Beta Tester Thank You
subject: Thank You for Beta Testing Little Movers!
html_content:
You're Amazing, {{first_name}}!

Your feedback has helped shape the Little Movers Guide into a better resource for families everywhere. As a thank-you, your lifetime access has been permanently activated. Thank you for giving your time!

name: Chapter 1 Release - Tummy Time Foundations
subject: Chapter 1 Is Live: Tummy Time Foundations
html_content:
Chapter 1: Tummy Time Foundations

Hi {{first_name}}, the first chapter of Little Movers is now available. Tummy time is the cornerstone of motor development - here's how to make it engaging and effective for your child.

name: Chapter 2 Release - Building Sitting Balance
subject: Chapter 2 Is Live: Building Sitting Balance
html_content:
Chapter 2: Building Sitting Balance

Hi {{first_name}}, Chapter 2 of Little Movers is now available! Learn fun, safe exercises to help your child develop trunk strength and sitting stability. Short video demos are included.

name: Chapter 3 Release - Crawling and Transitions
subject: Chapter 3 Is Live: Crawling and Developmental Transitions
html_content:
Chapter 3: Crawling and Developmental Transitions

Hi {{first_name}}, Chapter 3 is here! Explore crawling progressions and how to gently support your child through key motor milestones at their own pace.

name: Chapter 4 Release - Getting Ready to Stand
subject: Chapter 4 Is Live: Getting Ready to Stand
html_content:
Chapter 4: Getting Ready to Stand

Hi {{first_name}}, Chapter 4 of Little Movers focuses on building the leg strength and balance your child needs to pull to stand and take those first steps. You've got this!

name: Holiday Break Exercise Tips
subject: Keep the Momentum This Holiday Season - Little Movers Tips
html_content:
Holiday Exercises Made Easy, {{first_name}}!

With family gatherings and travel, routines can slip. Here are five quick exercises you can do anywhere - no equipment needed - to keep your child on track this holiday season.

name: New Year Goal-Setting for Parents
subject: New Year, New Milestones - Setting Goals With Little Movers
html_content:
Happy New Year, {{first_name}}!

Let's set meaningful, achievable goals for your child's motor development this year. Greg shares a simple three-step goal-setting framework that pairs perfectly with home therapy sessions.

name: Clinician Partnership Offer
subject: Partner With Little Movers - Share With Your Patients' Families
html_content:
Partnership Opportunity, {{first_name}}!

Little Movers is now offering a clinician partnership program. Refer families to the guide and receive co-branded handouts for your practice. Let's work together to support more kids.

name: Re-engagement - Inactive Parent
subject: We Miss You - Come Back to Little Movers
html_content:
Hi {{first_name}}, we noticed you haven't been around lately.

Life gets busy - we completely understand. Here's one simple 5-minute exercise you can try with your child today to gently get back into the routine.

name: Parent Feedback Survey Request
subject: 2 Minutes to Help More Families - Little Movers Survey
html_content:
Your Opinion Matters, {{first_name}}!

We're improving Little Movers and need your help. Please take 2 minutes to answer a few questions about your experience. Your feedback directly shapes future chapters and resources.

name: Full Guide Launch Announcement
subject: The Complete Little Movers Guide Is Here!
html_content:
It's Official, {{first_name}}!

The full Little Movers Home-Exercise Guide for families of children with developmental delays is now live at littlemoversguide.com. Thank you for your patience, support, and encouragement along the way!

name: Printable Exercise Card Download
subject: Your Free Printable Exercise Cards - Little Movers
html_content:
Download Your Cards, {{first_name}}!

We've created printable exercise cards for the most popular Little Movers activities. Stick them on your fridge and never forget the steps again. Download link inside!

name: Webinar Invitation - Ask Greg Live
subject: Join Greg Live: Ask a Pediatric PT Anything - {{webinar_date}}
html_content:
Free Live Q&A Webinar, {{first_name}}!

Greg Howard, DPT, is hosting a free live webinar on {{webinar_date}}. Bring your questions about your child's development and home therapy goals. Register at littlemoversguide.com/webinar.

name: Unsubscribe Confirmation
subject: You've Been Unsubscribed from Little Movers Emails
html_content: Hi {{first_name}}, you've been successfully removed from the Little Movers mailing list. We hope the guide has been helpful to your family. You can resubscribe anytime at littlemoversguide.com.
